name: LM317 Adjustable Bench Supply
description: Adjustable positive voltage regulator. Output voltage set by R1 and RV1. Vout = 1.25 × (1 + RV1/R1). C1 input bypass, C2 output bypass, D1 protects against reverse input voltage.
notes: Vout = 1.25V × (1 + RV1/R1). With R1=240Ω, RV1=0–5kΩ: Vout = 1.25V to 27V. Min input: Vout + 3V. D1 (1N4007) protects output cap discharge path. C1=100nF ceramic close to input pin. C2=10µF output. Heatsink required above ~1W dissipation: P = (Vin−Vout) × Iout.

components.notes: Fixed reference resistor — do not substitute
Output protection — cathode to OUT, anode to ADJ
